title: How to Build PoF-UI with PoF + UE5

steps.label: Feature Map Card System (Part 1)
steps.description:
Replace the toggle-list FeatureMapTab with a card-grid matrix.
Each feature becomes a FeatureCard component — clickable card with active/inactive states.
Active: colored background tint (withOpacity accent 8%), bright border (accent 30%), full-color content.
Inactive: muted border (neutral 20%), desaturated content, reduced opacity.
Card shows: feature name (mono bold), metric content area (children render prop), status dot (bottom-right).
Layout: CSS grid auto-fill, min 160px, gap-3. Tab groups become section headers.
Create: src/components/shared/FeatureCard.tsx, src/components/shared/FeatureCardGrid.tsx.
Update: src/components/modules/core-engine/unique-tabs/FeatureMapTab.tsx to use new components.
Keep Enable All / Disable All buttons. Add NeonBar progress at top.

decisions.rationale: Added cursor-pointer, tactile hover/active scale transforms, smooth status dot transition
Clean CSS grid with auto-fill min 160px, role=group, aria-label. Minimal and correct.
NeonBar progress, tab navigation, section headers, group-level and global Enable/Disable All buttons all present and correct
13 modules with flat section definitions, clean grouping logic, summary fields for key sections
Fixed setAll to skip no-op updates (matching setMany optimization), localStorage persistence, correct default-visible semantics

gotchas: Button elements default to cursor:default — always add cursor-pointer for clickable cards
setAll and setMany should both check for no-op to avoid unnecessary re-renders and localStorage writes
Tailwind scale transforms with hover/active give tactile feedback without needing framer-motion
steps.verification: PASS typecheck, FAIL lint, PASS test, FAIL visual-check

steps.label: Scalable Entity Selector (Part 1)
steps.description:
Create src/components/shared/ScalableSelector.tsx — a modal overlay component for picking
from 100+ entities. Must support: debounced search (300ms), group-by with collapsible sections,
virtual scroll for large lists, multi-select and single-select modes, keyboard navigation
(arrow keys, Enter, Escape), render prop for custom item cards, selected items shown as pills.
Props: items, groupBy, renderItem, onSelect, selected, searchKey, placeholder, mode.
Component structure: index.tsx, SelectorSearch.tsx, SelectorGroup.tsx, SelectorGrid.tsx, types.ts.
Place in src/components/shared/ScalableSelector/.

decisions.rationale: Custom useDebounced hook with configurable delay
Dynamic grouping by any key, collapsible state tracked in Set
Binary search visible range, rAF-throttled scroll, ResizeObserver, 6-row overscan
Single auto-closes, multi toggles membership, Ctrl+A selects all filtered
Arrow keys, PgUp/Dn, Home/End, Enter, Space, Escape — O(1) index lookup via Map

decisions.decision: Implemented Render prop for custom items
decisions.rationale: renderItem(item, selected) and renderGroupHeader(group) render props
Accent-colored pills with remove buttons, overflow +N indicator, clear all
Focus trap, scroll lock, focus restore, ARIA listbox/option/activedescendant, aria-live count
Clean 5-file split: types.ts, index.tsx, SelectorSearch.tsx, SelectorGroup.tsx, SelectorGrid.tsx

gotchas: Existing implementation was high quality — only needed minor cleanup (redundant array copy, missing keyboard hint). Binary search + overscan virtual scroll pattern handles 100+ items well.
steps.verification: PASS typecheck, FAIL lint, PASS test, FAIL visual-check

steps.label: Scalable Entity Selector (Part 2)
steps.description:
Create src/components/shared/ScalableSelector.tsx — a modal overlay component for picking
from 100+ entities. Must support: debounced search (300ms), group-by with collapsible sections,
virtual scroll for large lists, multi-select and single-select modes, keyboard navigation
(arrow keys, Enter, Escape), render prop for custom item cards, selected items shown as pills.
Props: items, groupBy, renderItem, onSelect, selected, searchKey, placeholder, mode.
Component structure: index.tsx, SelectorSearch.tsx, SelectorGroup.tsx, SelectorGrid.tsx, types.ts.
Place in src/components/shared/ScalableSelector/.

decisions.rationale: 300ms debounce with custom hook, search icon color transition, clear button, live count
Dynamic grouping with collapsible headers, chevron icons, item count badges
Binary search + overscan(6) with rAF-throttled scroll, ResizeObserver for viewport, O(1) scroll-to-focused via itemRowIndex map
Single mode auto-closes, multi mode toggles with Ctrl+A select-all
Full coverage: arrows, PgUp/Dn, Home/End, Enter/Space, Escape, Ctrl+A — O(1) index lookups via navigableIndexMap
renderItem receives item + selected boolean, renderGroupHeader for custom headers
Max 8 visible pills with +N more overflow, individual remove, clear all button
Dialog role, aria-modal, aria-activedescendant, aria-selected, focus trap, body scroll lock, trigger focus restore

gotchas: Redundant data structures (navigableSet vs navigableIndexMap) add allocation cost for zero benefit — Map.has() serves both index lookup and membership testing. Building auxiliary index maps alongside existing offset computation loops adds O(1) lookups at zero extra pass cost.

steps.label: Entity Metadata Schema (Part 2)
steps.description:
Define TypeScript interfaces for categorizing game entities.
Create src/types/game-metadata.ts with:
- EntityMetadata: id, name, category, subcategory?, tags[], level?, levelMax?, area?, tier?, icon?
- EntityGrouping: field (keyof EntityMetadata), label, order? (explicit group sort)
- Default grouping presets: CHAR_GROUPINGS (category→subcategory), ITEM_GROUPINGS (category→tier),
  ABILITY_GROUPINGS (category→element), ENEMY_GROUPINGS (area→tier)
Extend each module's data.ts with metadata fields on mock items (add category, tags, area, tier).
This is the foundation for ScalableSelector group-by in Phase 2.

decisions.rationale: All fields present: id, name, category, subcategory?, tags[], level?, levelMax?, area?, tier?, icon?
All 6 presets have explicit order arrays where appropriate. Added element order to ABILITY_GROUPINGS.
Fixed Ungrouped bucket to always sort last even with explicit order. Array field expansion, fallback sorting all correct.
All 6 domains (Character, Item, Ability, Enemy, Zone, Loot) derive metadata from domain data with proper tags and tiers.

gotchas: ABILITY_METADATA was producing a meaningless 'none' tag when damageType was 'None' — always filter sentinel values before lowercasing into tags
LOOT_ENTRY_METADATA tags were too sparse (rarity only) — category and subcategory should always appear as tags for consistent filterability across domains
ZONE_METADATA had area=z.name duplicating the name field — zones ARE areas, so area field is redundant; added z.group tag instead for topology grouping
groupEntities must check for 'Ungrouped' key BEFORE consulting the order index, otherwise 'Ungrouped' gets Infinity and sorts alphabetically among other overflow groups instead of always being last
steps.verification: PASS typecheck, FAIL lint, PASS test, FAIL visual-check

steps.label: Cross-Module Style Audit (Part 1)
steps.description:
Verify visual consistency across all 7 modules.
1. Grep for hardcoded colors, inconsistent spacing, non-standard fonts.
2. Verify same card/header/stat style everywhere.
3. Check tab nav looks identical across modules.
4. Verify ScalableSelector renders consistently.
5. Check Feature Map card sizing across modules.
6. Run contrast check on all text/bg combinations (WCAG AA 4.5:1).

decisions.rationale: Eliminated all non-pseudo-class hardcoded Tailwind color classes across 30+ files. Converted 80+ violations to chart-colors tokens via inline styles.
All modules use shared BlueprintPanel, SectionHeader, GlowStat, TabHeader, FeatureCard components consistently. FeatureCardGrid uses uniform minmax(160px,1fr) sizing.
All 12+ tabbed modules use the shared SubTabNavigation component with consistent accent-based active state, spring animation, and gap/padding.
Used across 9 files with consistent import path, SelectorItem interface, groupBy patterns, and renderItem callbacks.
FeatureCard and FeatureCardGrid use proper chart-colors tokens with consistent auto-fill grid layout across all modules.
All active text/bg combos pass AA (4.5:1). STATUS_NEUTRAL on surface is 3.82:1 — used only for inactive/disabled state which is acceptable.

learnings: Button elements default to cursor:default — always add cursor-pointer for clickable cards
setAll and setMany should both check for no-op to avoid unnecessary re-renders and localStorage writes

Redundant data structures (navigableSet vs navigableIndexMap) add allocation cost for zero benefit — Map.has() serves both index lookup and membership testing. Building auxiliary index maps alongside existing offset computation loops adds O(1) lookups at zero extra pass cost.
